src/lib/components/FlexiTable.react.js.description:
FlexiTable — enterprise-grade hierarchical data table.

Backward-compatible with the original API (id, data, level1Group, level2Group,
aggrFunction, aggrCols, conditionalStyles, expandedGroups, setProps) and adds
optional props for title/description, search, density, export, theme, and
numeric formatting. All new props are optional.

data.description: Row objects. Columns are inferred from the first row's keys.

aggrCols.description: Columns whose values are aggregated at group rows.

conditionalStyles.description: Conditional styles applied per-cell; each rule matches a column and operator.

expandedGroups.description: Controlled map of groupKey → expanded boolean.

title.description: Optional title displayed in the toolbar.

description.description: Optional subtitle / description below the title.

searchable.description: Show a search input in the toolbar.

exportable.description: Show an "Export CSV" button in the toolbar.

stickyHeader.description: Whether the header row stays pinned when scrolling.

stripe.description: Whether zebra striping is applied to data rows.

emptyMessage.description: Message shown when there is no data.

numberFormat.description: Optional function to format numeric cells. Receives the raw value.

showTotals.description: Show a grand-totals footer row beneath the table.

totalCols.description: Columns to total in the footer. Defaults to every numeric column.

totalFunction.description: Aggregation function for the footer row. Defaults to `'sum'`.

totalLabel.description: Label rendered in the first column of the totals footer.

stickyFooter.description: Whether the totals footer stays pinned to the bottom on scroll.
